subcodes.title: Words to Juliet Thompson, spoken on 1912-11-12
subcodes.first_line: With those who are against the Center of the Covenant you must not associate at all.... You will see a dimness on the faces, like the letting down of a veil.
subcodes.subjects: @avoidance of Covenant-Breakers, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @light and darkness
